_comment: Source of truth for the build loop. CLAUDE.md reads this at the start of every session. Don't hand-edit gate results — they're written by scripts/check_*_gate.py so they reflect what was actually measured, not what someone hoped for.

inference_pool.threshold: Groq (primary tier, spec §6) succeeds on judging AND architecture task-shaped prompts. Workers AI status is recorded but not required to pass.

build_pipeline.threshold: The .github/workflows/team-build-turn.yml workflow completes successfully at least once, per spec §8

details.inference_router: src/router.ts, verified live via POST /inference (Groq primary)

details.rag_memory: Vectorize-backed, agent-scoped recall verified (0.79-0.83 similarity on relevant queries, confirmed no cross-agent leakage)
details.research: Tavily only (free forever, no card) — Exa tried and dropped after cost/alternative research, see project memory 2026-07-21

details.queue: event_queue table, atomic UPDATE...RETURNING claiming (D1 has no FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED but doesn't need one — single-primary serialized writes), ported from ideaconnect
details.scheduler_executor_split: scheduler.ts never calls an LLM, only decides what's due; executor.ts claims + dispatches + calls the router, ported from ideaconnect
phases_verified_live: deep_research (12 agents queued, real ones completed via the LIVE cron trigger autonomously, unprompted)
architecture (real build plans generated matching spec's tech-stack/components/risks/fallback format)
details.self_healing: resetStuckItems verified — force-orphaned an in_progress row, confirmed it was reset to pending and successfully reprocessed within the same tick
details.real_bug_found_and_fixed: router.ts TASK_MODELS had no Workers AI fallback for 'design'/'validate' task types, causing hard failures during a Groq burst instead of falling through per spec §6 — added the missing fallbacks
details.not_in_scope: hackathon team formation / build-turn GitHub Actions dispatch is week4_build_system per the roadmap
